title: cenchrus ciliaris var. setigerus
intro: Cenchrus ciliaris var. setigerus, commonly known as blue buffalo grass, is a type of grass native to tropical Africa and India. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cenchrus ciliaris var. setigerus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
